title: Luxury Lace Loungewear Catalog Fashion Advertisement AI
sourceTitle: Luxury Lace Loungewear Catalog Fashion Advertisement AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: luxury lace loungewear catalog fashion advertisement. Hero Subject: fictional adult Japanese fashion model with long black hair and soft natural makeup wearing a burgundy lace-trim satin pajama suit with a long robe, fully covered torso and tasteful catalog styling. Scene or Context: bright minimal indoor room with sheer curtains, warm soft window light, luxury editorial catalog spacing, cream background blur and non-explicit loungewear presentation. Composition: vertical 2:3 fashion advertisement poster, model slightly right, seated or standing calmly, clean left-side layout area for title and product details; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5, 2:3, 3:4, or 9:16 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: ultra-realistic luxury loungewear catalog photography, refined skin texture, cinematic warm tone, premium serif editorial layout, full-coverage wardrobe; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: ERIKA / 2026 MODEL / LACE LOUNGEWEAR COLLECTION / ELEGANCE MEETS COMFORT; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Restrictions: adult model only, non-explicit full-coverage loungewear styling, no bra-and-panty presentation, no nudity, no body-size sexualization, no real brand logo, no messy typography, no watermark; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Public-page safety: adult subject only, full-coverage styling, no cleavage, no bare midriff, no lingerie presentation, no sexualized pose, no fetish framing. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
